overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a robed character exploring a gothic castle interior with high vaulted ceilings and marble floors. The character traverses grand halls, ascends ornate staircases, walks through a misty corridor with tall windows, and enters a large room containing indoor trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand entrance hall with vaulted ceilings and exhibits

events.description: character turns right to begin ascending the grand staircase
passing a large skeletal exhibit displayed on a pedestal

agents.ego_description: walking through the grand hall and beginning to ascend the main staircase

entered.detail: tall ornate stained glass window at the far end of the hall
gothic stone arches lining the sides of the hall
polished marble floor with geometric patterns
ornate wooden handrails along the staircase
large creature skeleton mounted on a stone pedestal
massive carved stone columns supporting the vaulted ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character begins in a grand gothic hall with a massive stained glass window at the far end. The space features marble floors, stone pillars, and wooden railings. The character walks forward, turns right, and begins ascending the staircase, passing by a large skeletal exhibit on display.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand staircase with landings and portraits

events.description: turning left on the stair landing to continue the ascent
approaching and opening the large wooden door at the top of the stairs

agents.ego_description: continuing up the grand staircase toward the upper level door

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes walking down the stairs in the opposite direction

entered.detail: wide stone staircase with ornate wooden railings
framed portraits hanging on the walls along the stairs
large dark wooden door with metal fixtures at the top of the stairs
lit wall-mounted lanterns providing warm light

segments.scene_description: The character continues ascending the grand staircase, passing oil paintings and wall sconces. Another student walks down the stairs in the opposite direction. The character reaches the top landing and approaches a large wooden door.

scene_state.functional_zone: long stone corridor with tall windows and atmospheric green mist

events.description: entering the narrow stone corridor through the wooden door
passing tall narrow windows with bright light creating high contrast in the dim corridor
encountering another student walking ahead in the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking down the long corridor with green mist floating in the air

notable_agents.action: student walking ahead down the corridor toward the staircase

entered.detail: tall stone walls with gothic architectural details
vertical slit windows letting in bright daylight
ornate ceiling-mounted lanterns illuminating the corridor
atmospheric green smoke or mist floating in the corridor air
floor with diamond and zigzag tile patterns

segments.scene_description: The character enters a long, narrow stone corridor with tall windows on the right side and green mist floating in the air. The corridor is dimly lit by hanging lanterns and light from the windows. The character follows another student down the corridor toward a staircase at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: large hall with indoor trees and bright natural lighting

events.description: ascending the final staircase and entering the large room with indoor trees
emerging into a much brighter space with natural light streaming through tall windows

agents.ego_description: climbing the stairs and entering the large room with indoor trees

entered.detail: large mature trees growing inside the hall with thick trunks
tall gothic windows with bright light streaming through
large decorative wall hanging with intricate designs
statue of a centaur with a bow on a stone pedestal

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the final staircase and enters a large, bright hall containing mature trees growing indoors. The room features tall windows with streaming light, a centaur statue, and wall tapestries. The atmosphere shifts from the dim corridor to this airy, natural space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a gothic castle interior that transforms from a grand, formal hall into a bright, nature-filled sanctuary. It begins in a massive hall with marble floors and a stained glass window, moving forward and turning right to ascend a staircase past a skeletal exhibit. As the character continues upward past oil paintings and wall sconces, the scene shifts through a large wooden door into a narrow, dimly lit stone corridor filled with floating green mist and hanging lanterns. The camera then follows a student toward a final staircase, where the atmosphere abruptly opens up from the claustrophobic hallway into a vast, airy hall. This final space is flooded with streaming light from tall windows, featuring indoor mature trees, wall tapestries, and a centaur statue.
